'''鈭歴h-y-n-t''' ('''kashaynetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jetset|jetset]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jetset|jetset]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-y-n-t
|-
! Lemma
| kashaynetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishaynetoko|thishaynetoko]] || [[word:jishaynetoko|jishaynetoko]] || [[word:shishaynetoko|shishaynetoko]] || [[word:kishaynetoko|kishaynetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushaynetoko|thuthushaynetoko]] || [[word:jujushaynetoko|jujushaynetoko]] || [[word:shushushaynetoko|shushushaynetoko]] || [[word:kukushaynetoko|kukushaynetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushaynetoko|thushaynetoko]] || [[word:jushaynetoko|jushaynetoko]] || [[word:shushaynetoko|shushaynetoko]] || [[word:kushaynetoko|kushaynetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shaynetoko|th忙shaynetoko]] || [[word:j忙shaynetoko|j忙shaynetoko]] || [[word:sh忙shaynetoko|sh忙shaynetoko]] || [[word:k忙shaynetoko|k忙shaynetoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashaynetoko|thashaynetoko]] || [[word:jashaynetoko|jashaynetoko]] || [[word:shashaynetoko|shashaynetoko]] || [[word:kashaynetoko|kashaynetoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
